prompt: Build a simple to-do list app with users, tasks, and deadlines.
Create an e-commerce platform with products, categories, a shopping cart, and orders.
I need a blog engine where authors can write posts, and visitors can leave comments.
Build a CRM with login, contacts, dashboard, role-based access, and premium plan with payments. Admins can see analytics.
Create a real estate directory with property listings, agents, and lead capture forms.
A fitness tracking app where users log workouts, meals, and track their weight over time.
A job board with employers posting jobs and candidates submitting resumes.
A doctor appointment booking system with patient records and doctor schedules.
An event management platform selling tickets with QR codes.
A recipe sharing app with ingredients, steps, and user ratings.
Build an app.
Create a secure banking app that doesn't use passwords or any authentication.
I want a system with users and admins. Ensure users can delete everything. Admins can do nothing.
Make a social network.
Build a data dashboard, but with no database and no API.
Make an app to track my cats. I also need an enterprise ERP system.
Design a system.
Something with forms.
A completely offline web app that requires constant server sync.
Build a payment system that never charges money.
